title: THRIFT STORE - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY FAMILY THRIFT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers clothing, household items, furniture, and an assortment of miscellaneous items. 1367 Redwood Avenue Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-5pm. Donations accepted Tuesday-Saturday 10am-4pm.
